sections.title: Senior Software Engineer
sections.description: Full Stack Software Engineer most proficient in frontend JavaScript and backend Java with experience in enterprise and startup development in financial services, ecommerce, and media platforms.

description: Full stack developer in 2025 leading frontend development in React and TypeScript for the AI4Finance team — building UI components, dashboards, and AI-driven analysis with multi-agent frameworks, forecasting, and chat to aid finance analysts in productivity
Backend development in Python creating AI agents and tools utilizing LangGraph, SQL, data lakes, and connections to other microservices
Backend Java development in 2024 creating services, RESTful APIs, and frontend components with React for Intuit's B2B corporate tax platform ProConnect and Interview Service team

Full stack development in 2023 with the localization team to offer Intuit's products for Spanish-speaking customers on TurboTax/CreditKarma, migrating legacy content to a modern stack for client-facing webpages reaching over 100M customers
Designing and improving UX, backend services, and AI-driven applications utilizing models from Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenAI
Technologies: Python, Java, TypeScript, React, Jenkins, Splunk, Git, GraphQL, Argo, SageMaker, Databricks, LLMs, S3, Athena, and AWS infrastructure

Full stack development with backend Java (SpringBoot) and frontend JavaScript (React/Redux) for a RESTful web app providing Video Descriptors, Video Popularity, and Personalized Images products to video streaming services
Maintained a distributed system of video metadata replicated across multiple languages and regions, used for content recognition, advertising, and marketing data
AWS infrastructure with backend/frontend servers, SQL DB, S3, ETL pipelines with Airflow, Kubernetes, and Big Data with Hadoop, Spark, and Parquet
Daily responsibilities in Java, SQL, and JavaScript with React/Redux, system design, and code reviews
Full stack development on a Service Oriented Architecture (SOA) for a web ecommerce platform with over 1B monthly page views and 100M+ monthly unique visitors
Backend Java and frontend JavaScript on the Checkout Team and Itinerary Team
Developed UI enhancements for users' payment and post-payment experience
Technologies: Java, Scala, Spring MVC, jQuery, HTML, CSS, React, REST, NodeJS, Gradle, Git, Jenkins, JUnit, Ruby, and Cucumber
Distributed system in Java, Spring MVC, JPA/Hibernate, Oracle SQL, and Flash that automated and facilitated the workflow of internal teams pricing Net Asset Values for funds and pensions
Business Intelligence dashboards with Tableau and ETL jobs with Pentaho
Agile team with 2-week sprints; daily responsibilities in backend Java and SQL reports

degree.name: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering

school projects: Designed and built an Electronic Refreshable Braille Display for the Visually Impaired
Real-Time Digital Audio Effects Playback with MicroController and FPGA (Motorola Assembly)

personal projects: Interactive Web Resume — React + TypeScript app with filtering, drag-and-drop reordering, dark mode, and keyword highlighting (this site)
AI Finance Dashboard — multi-agent LangGraph application for financial analysis, forecasting, and chat interface for finance analysts
BLE Bike Safety App — Android application using Bluetooth Low Energy beacons for real-time cyclist safety alerts
